title: OpenEPCIS DPP Core Vocabulary
description:
Core vocabulary for Digital Product Passports aligned with the EU Ecodesign
for Sustainable Products Regulation (ESPR) EU 2024/1781 and GS1 DPP Standards.

OpenEPCIS DPP-Ready: The Universal DPP Platform - harmonizing GS1, UNTP, and CIRPASS2 standards.

This vocabulary provides shared patterns reusable across domain-specific regulations
(Battery, EUDR, Textile, Electronics, etc.) and supports the ESPR framework including:
- Economic operator identification (EOID per ESPR Article 77)
- Facility information (manufacturing location data)
- Performance and durability information
- Repairability and maintenance data
- Substances of concern (SCIP database alignment)
- Circularity information (end-of-life, recycling)
- Due diligence reporting (supply chain transparency)
- Document references (reports, certificates, guides)
- Access rights (public vs authorized data per ESPR Article 9)
- Emissions performance (carbon footprint with UNTP alignment)
- Traceability performance (supply chain verification metrics)

GS1 Web Vocabulary patterns to use:
- For certifications: gs1:certification with gs1:CertificationDetails
- For warranty: gs1:warranty with gs1:WarrantyPromise
- For regulatory compliance: gs1:regulatoryInformation with gs1:RegulatoryInformation
- For documents: gs1:referencedFile with gs1:ReferencedFileDetails
- For recycling text: gs1:consumerRecyclingInstructions

UNTP Alignment:
Property naming, patterns, and value conventions are aligned with UN Transparency Protocol (UNTP)
to enable native interoperability. Cross-vocabulary mappings are declared via graded SKOS relations
(skos:exactMatch for 1:1, skos:closeMatch for approximate, skos:broadMatch where this term is narrower).
All ratio/fraction properties use 0-1 decimal scale (e.g., 0.45 = 45%).

EPCIS 2.0 Extension Declaration:
GS1-Extensions: oec=https://ref.openepcis.io/extensions/common/core/

Extension Governance:
This vocabulary extends GS1 Web Vocabulary only where no equivalent term exists.
Each extension term includes:
- dcterms:source linking to the regulatory requirement
- skos:note explaining why the extension is needed
- rdfs:seeAlso linking to related GS1/schema.org/UNTP terms where applicable
- a graded SKOS mapping relation (skos:exactMatch / skos:closeMatch / skos:broadMatch) where a cross-vocabulary match exists

Domain-specific vocabularies import this core and add regulation-specific extensions.

classes.label: Access Rights
classes.comment:
Access control for DPP data per ESPR Article 9.
Defines which data is publicly accessible vs. restricted to authorized parties.

classes.label: Biodegradability
classes.comment: An observed biodegradability result for a substance or material, typically per ISO 14593 / OECD 301B/D/F / OECD 310 test methods. Represents a measurement, not a regulatory category.

classes.label: Carbon Footprint Declaration
classes.comment: An observation of a product's lifecycle carbon footprint, broken down by lifecycle stage. Used for EU Battery Annex II §8, ESPR carbon-footprint declarations, PEF reporting, and PPWR optional disclosures.

classes.label: Circularity Performance
classes.comment:
Information supporting circular economy requirements including
end-of-life handling, recycling, waste prevention, and circularity metrics.
Aligned with UNTP CircularityPerformance pattern.

classes.label: Compostability
classes.comment: Compostability category and certification standard for a product or material. Distinct from biodegradability: compostability is a regulatory-recognised classification, not a continuous measurement.

classes.label: Data Element
classes.comment: Abstract base for a DPP data point (EN 18223 4.1.2.3). Not used directly; see its subclasses.

classes.label: Data Element Collection
classes.comment: A container of one or more DataElements (EN 18223 4.1.2.4).

classes.label: Deposit-Return Scheme
classes.comment: A deposit-return scheme that the product participates in (PPWR Article 13, beverage container DRS in DE/AT/NL/SE/etc., and any future EU-harmonised DRS).

classes.label: Digital Product Passport
classes.comment: The DPP envelope: identification and lifecycle metadata plus the product data elements, per the EN 18223 information model.

classes.label: Document Reference
classes.comment:
Reference to an external document such as reports, certificates,
manuals, or guides. Supports multiple languages and formats.
See also gs1:ReferencedFileDetails for GS1 Web Vocabulary equivalent.

classes.label: Due Diligence Report
classes.comment:
Supply chain due diligence information supporting transparency requirements.
Reusable across Battery Regulation Art. 39, EUDR, and other due diligence frameworks.

classes.label: Emissions Performance
classes.comment:
Container for greenhouse gas emissions data including carbon footprint,
lifecycle phases, and verification status. Aligned with UNTP EmissionsPerformance.

classes.label: End-of-Life Program
classes.comment: A take-back / collection / dismantling program operating across PPWR, WEEE, Battery, Textile take-back, and ELV. Distinct from EPR registration: EPR is the producer's compliance registration; this is the consumer-facing program with collection points, refunds, and dismantling guides.

classes.label: Energy Efficiency
classes.comment: A product's energy efficiency declaration: A-G class, EPREL registration, consumption modes.

classes.label: Environmental Product Declaration
classes.comment:
A type III environmental declaration per EN 15804:2012+A2:2019 / ISO 14025,
reporting life-cycle environmental impact indicators broken down by lifecycle module.

classes.label: Extended Producer Responsibility
classes.comment:
A registration of a producer's compliance with an Extended Producer
Responsibility (EPR) scheme for a specific waste stream and jurisdiction.
EPR schemes apply across PPWR (packaging), WEEE (electronics), Battery
Regulation, ELV (vehicles), Textile-DA (proposed), and others; every
regulation covered by this ontology. No upstream vocabulary defines this
class; UNTP v0.7.0 has no EPR-specific term, and CIRPASS-2 D3.2 confirms it
as a gap.

classes.label: Facility Information
classes.comment:
Manufacturing or processing facility information per ESPR.
Captures facility identification, location, and certification data.
Use gs1:gln for facility identification, gs1:name for facility name, gs1:address for location (all inherited from gs1:Place).
Use GS1 Digital Link format: https://id.gs1.org/414/{GLN}

classes.label: Hazardous Substance
classes.comment:
A hazardous substance declaration per EU CLP Regulation 1272/2008.
Reusable across product categories.

classes.label: Impact Indicator Result
classes.comment:
One environmental impact indicator (e.g. Global Warming Potential) reported within
an EPD: its indicator type, declared unit, aggregate value, and optional per-lifecycle-module values.

classes.label: Individual Trade Item Piece
classes.comment: A single physical piece of a multi-piece trade item, identified via GS1 AI 8026 (ITIP). Used when a single GTIN is composed of multiple individually-shipped pieces (e.g., a 2-piece suit, a furniture set).

classes.label: Lifecycle Stage Result
classes.comment: The value of an impact indicator for a single EN 15804 lifecycle module (e.g. A1, B6, C3, D).

classes.label: Material Composition
classes.comment:
Material composition information including source country,
percentage, and critical raw material classification.

classes.label: Multi-Language Data Element
classes.comment: A language-dependent data point carrying one or more language-tagged values (EN 18223 4.1.2.8).

classes.label: Multi-Language Value
classes.comment: A language-tagged value: a string plus its language (EN 18223 4.1.2.8.2).

classes.label: Multi-Valued Data Element
classes.comment: An ordered list of DataElements of the same type (EN 18223 4.1.2.6).

classes.label: Operator Information
classes.comment:
Economic operator information as required by various EU regulations.
Captures manufacturer, importer, distributor, and other operator roles.
Use gs1:gln for operator identification (inherited from gs1:Organization).
Use GS1 Digital Link format: https://id.gs1.org/417/{GLN}

classes.label: Performance Information
classes.comment:
Product performance and durability information per ESPR Article 7.
Captures expected lifespan, usage cycles, and performance metrics.

classes.label: Recyclability Assessment
classes.comment: An assessment of a product's recyclability. Different regulations express the same concept differently: PPWR uses letter grades A/B/C, the JRC textile methodology uses a 0-10 score, electronics WEEE uses a 0-1 rate. All three are optional; pick whichever your regulation requires.

classes.label: Recycled Content
classes.comment:
Declaration of recycled material content with pre-consumer
and post-consumer splits.

classes.label: Repairability Information
classes.comment:
Repair and maintenance information per ESPR Article 7.
Captures repair scores, spare part availability, and repair instructions.

classes.label: Repair Provider
classes.comment: An authorised repair provider for a product. Supports the European online platform for repair (Article 7 of Directive 2024/1799) and manufacturer-published repair networks.

classes.label: Single-Valued Data Element
classes.comment: A single data point with one value (EN 18223 4.1.2.5).

classes.label: Substance of Concern
classes.comment:
Substances of concern declaration aligned with SCIP database
and ESPR requirements. Extends HazardousSubstance for detailed tracking.

classes.label: Traceability Performance
classes.comment:
Supply chain verification and traceability metrics indicating the proportion
of materials that are verifiably traced through the supply chain.

properties.label: Access Level
properties.comment: The access level for this data (Public, AuthorizedOnly, Restricted).

properties.label: Access Rights
properties.comment: Access control configuration for this data element.

properties.label: Activity Classification
properties.comment: Industry/economic activity classification code (UN ISIC, EU NACE, US NAICS).

properties.label: Annual Energy Consumption
properties.comment: Annual energy consumption. gs1:QuantitativeValue with unitCode 'KWH'.

properties.label: Authorized Parties
properties.comment: List of parties authorized to access restricted data.

properties.label: Bio-based Fraction
properties.comment: Mass fraction (0-1) of the product or material derived from renewable biological feedstock (rather than fossil-derived). Use unitCode 'P1' (UN/CEFACT Rec 20) when expressed via gs1:QuantitativeValue.

properties.label: Biodegradability Test Method
properties.comment: The test method used to determine the biodegradability percentage.

properties.label: Biodegradation Percentage
properties.comment: Percentage of substance biodegraded under the test method conditions. Use unitCode 'P1' (UN/CEFACT Rec 20) when expressed via gs1:QuantitativeValue.

properties.label: Carbon Footprint
properties.comment: Carbon footprint measurement for the product.

properties.label: Carbon Footprint Declaration
properties.comment: Links a product to its carbon footprint declaration.

properties.label: Carbon Footprint: Distribution
properties.comment: Lifecycle stage emissions from distribution and logistics. gs1:QuantitativeValue with unitCode 'KGM'.

properties.label: Carbon Footprint: End of Life
properties.comment: Lifecycle stage emissions from end-of-life and recycling. gs1:QuantitativeValue with unitCode 'KGM'.

properties.label: Carbon Footprint Methodology
properties.comment: URI of the methodology used (e.g. EN 45552, ISO 14067, PEF, GHG Protocol).

properties.label: Carbon Footprint: Production
properties.comment: Lifecycle stage emissions from main product production. gs1:QuantitativeValue with unitCode 'KGM'.

properties.label: Carbon Footprint: Raw Material Acquisition
properties.comment: Lifecycle stage emissions from raw-material acquisition and pre-processing. gs1:QuantitativeValue with unitCode 'KGM' (kg CO2e) and oec:declaredFunctionalUnit set on the parent CarbonFootprintDeclaration.

properties.label: Carbon Footprint Study URL
properties.comment: URL to the full carbon footprint study.

properties.label: Carbon Footprint Total
properties.comment: Total lifecycle carbon footprint in kg CO2e. Aligned with UNTP carbonFootprint.

properties.label: Carbon Footprint: Use Phase
properties.comment: Lifecycle stage emissions from product use. gs1:QuantitativeValue with unitCode 'KGM'.

properties.label: CAS Number
properties.comment: Chemical Abstracts Service registry number.

properties.label: Circularity Performance
properties.comment: Circularity performance data for the product.

properties.label: Collection Point Directory URL
properties.comment: URL of a directory of physical collection points.

properties.label: Compliance Date
properties.comment: Date of compliance verification.

properties.label: Compliance Status
properties.comment: Current compliance status.

properties.label: Component Identifier
properties.comment: Identifier for the material or component (e.g. an internal material code or GS1 identifier).

properties.label: Component Name
properties.comment: Human-readable name of the material or component (e.g. a fibre type, alloy, or constituent material).

properties.label: Compostability Standard
properties.comment: URI of the standard the compostability claim is certified against (e.g. EN 13432, OK-Compost-Home, ASTM D6400).

properties.label: Concentration
properties.comment: Concentration of the hazardous substance as percentage.

properties.label: Content Specification Identifier
properties.comment: Reference to a horizontal or product-type content specification for the DPP (EN 18223 'contentSpecificationIds'). In EPCIS4DPP mirrors the declared GS1-Extensions namespaces.

properties.label: CRM List Version
properties.comment: Version reference of the EU Critical Raw Materials list against which the isCriticalRawMaterial / isStrategicRawMaterial flags were determined (e.g. CRMA-2024 Annex II / Annex I). The list is updated periodically by the Commission.

properties.label: Customs Commodity Code
properties.comment: A commodity code assigned to a trade item for customs classification. The coding system (HS / CN / HTSUS) is indicated by oec:customsCommodityCodeType on the same trade item. GS1 has no native property for this; tariffs and regulatory obligations across EU Combined Nomenclature, US HTSUS, and WCO HS all need it.

properties.label: Customs Commodity Code Type
properties.comment: The classification system (HS, CN, HTSUS, etc.) used for oec:customsCommodityCode on the same trade item.

properties.label: Data Element
properties.comment: Member DataElement of a DigitalProductPassport, DataElementCollection, or MultiValuedDataElement (EN 18223 4.1.2.4, 4.1.2.6).

properties.label: Data Provider Certification
properties.comment: Certification or accreditation of the data provider.

properties.label: Data Quality Assessment
properties.comment: Assessment of data quality and completeness (A-E rating).

properties.label: Data Retention Period
properties.comment: How long the data must be retained per regulatory requirements. Use unitCode 'ANN' (UN/CEFACT Rec 20).

properties.label: Declared Unit
properties.comment: Functional unit for carbon footprint or other metrics (e.g., kg CO2e/kWh, kg CO2e/kg). Aligned with UNTP declaredUnit.

properties.label: Deposit Amount
properties.comment: Refundable deposit applied at point of sale. Modelled as gs1:QuantitativeValue with unitCode = ISO 4217 currency code (e.g. 'EUR').

properties.label: Deposit Redemption Channel URL
properties.comment: URL of the public directory of redemption channels (where consumers can return the container for refund).

properties.label: Deposit-Return Scheme
properties.comment: Links a product (typically gs1:Packaging) to the DRS it participates in.

properties.label: Deposit Scheme Operator
properties.comment: The Producer Responsibility Organisation that operates the DRS (e.g. Pfand-System Deutschland for DE).

properties.label: Dictionary Reference
properties.comment: Reference to the data-point definition in a data dictionary (EN 18223 4.1.2.3). In EPCIS4DPP a ref.openepcis.io term IRI; ref.openepcis.io is the EN 18223 4.3 data-dictionary repository.

properties.label: Decentralized Identifier
properties.comment: DID (Decentralized Identifier) linking this entity to verifiable identity infrastructure.

properties.label: Dismantling Guide URL
properties.comment: URL of the public dismantling / repair guide for end-of-life processors.

properties.label: DIY Repair Possible
properties.comment: Whether the product can be repaired by consumers (do-it-yourself repair).

properties.label: Documents
properties.comment: Supporting documents for the product.

properties.label: Document URL
properties.comment: URL to the document. See also gs1:referencedFileURL.

properties.label: DPP Schema Version
properties.comment: The schema or standard version the DPP instance conforms to (EN 18223 'dppSchemaVersion'). Distinct from the content version oec:passportVersion.

properties.label: Due Diligence Regulation Context
properties.comment: The specific regulation against which a due diligence statement is asserted: Battery Annex X (Reg. 2023/1542), EUDR Article 9 (Reg. 2023/1115), CSDDD (Dir. 2024/1760), Forced Labour Regulation (2024/3015), OECD Conflict Minerals, etc. Same oec:DueDiligenceReport shape; different regulatory anchor.

properties.label: Due Diligence Report
properties.comment: Reference to due diligence documentation.

properties.label: EC Number
properties.comment: European Community number for the substance (EINECS/ELINCS).

properties.label: Economic Operator ID
properties.comment:
Unique EOID from the EU economic operator registry per ESPR Article 77.
This replaces individual national registrations with a single EU-wide identifier.

properties.label: Element Id
properties.comment: Identifier of a DataElement, unique within its container (EN 18223 4.1.2.3).

properties.label: Emissions Performance
properties.comment: Emissions performance data container. Aligned with UNTP EmissionsPerformance.

properties.label: End of Life Instructions
properties.comment: URL to end-of-life handling instructions. For text-based recycling guidance, see gs1:consumerRecyclingInstructions.

properties.label: Environmental Product Declaration
properties.comment: Links a product to its EN 15804 environmental product declaration.

properties.label: EORI Number
properties.comment: Economic Operators Registration and Identification (EORI) number for customs purposes.

properties.label: EPD Programme Operator
properties.comment: Name of the EPD programme operator (e.g. EPD International, IBU, EcoPlatform).

properties.label: EPD Registration Number
properties.comment: Registration / declaration number assigned by the EPD programme operator.

properties.label: EPD Reference Standard
properties.comment: Reference standard and product category rules version used (e.g. EN 15804+A2).

properties.label: EPD Valid Until
properties.comment: Date until which the EPD is valid.

properties.label: EPR Compliance URL
properties.comment: URL of the EPR scheme operator's public verification endpoint or compliance certificate for this producer.

properties.label: EPREL Product URL
properties.comment: URL of the product's EPREL public page.

properties.label: EPREL Registration Number
properties.comment: EU EPREL (European Product Registry for Energy Labelling) registration number.

properties.label: EPR Jurisdiction
properties.comment: The country / member state where this EPR registration applies. EPR schemes are organised per Member State; producers selling into multiple MS register in each.

properties.label: EPR Registration Number
properties.comment: Producer registration number issued by an EPR compliance scheme operator (e.g. Stiftung EAR for German WEEE, EcoEmballages for French packaging).

properties.label: EPR Scheme Operator
properties.comment: The Producer Responsibility Organisation (PRO) or competent authority that operates the EPR scheme. Modelled as a gs1:Organization or untp:Party.

properties.label: EPR Waste Stream
properties.comment: The waste stream the EPR registration covers: packaging, weee, batteries, vehicles, textiles, etc. Free-text token; controlled vocabulary may be added when EU publishes one.

properties.label: Expected Lifespan
properties.comment: Expected product lifespan. Use gs1:QuantitativeValue with unitCode (e.g., 'ANN' for years).

properties.label: Extended Producer Responsibility
properties.comment: Links a product or operator to one or more EPR registrations covering it.

properties.label: Facility Certifications
properties.comment: Certifications held by the facility (ISO 9001, ISO 14001, etc.).

properties.label: Facility Identifier
properties.comment: Identifier of a facility involved in the product's life cycle (EN 18223 'facilityId', formatted per EN 18219). In EPCIS4DPP a GLN. See oec:FacilityInformation for the richer facility record.

properties.label: Facility Information
properties.comment: Manufacturing or processing facility details.

properties.label: Facility Type
properties.comment: Type of facility (manufacturing, processing, assembly, etc.).

properties.label: Forced-Labour-Free Assertion
properties.comment: Boolean assertion that the product is free of forced labour per EU Regulation 2024/3015. Substantiate with dueDiligenceReport URL + thirdPartyAssurance evidence.

properties.label: Granularity Level
properties.comment: Passport-level granularity (EN 18223 'granularity'): the string token 'model', 'batch', or 'item' (see oec:GranularityLevel).

properties.label: Guaranteed Lifespan
properties.comment: Guaranteed minimum product lifespan per manufacturer warranty. Use unitCode 'ANN' (UN/CEFACT Rec 20).

properties.label: Hazard Class
properties.comment: CLP Regulation hazard classification.

properties.label: Hazard Impact
properties.comment: Description of the hazard impact.

properties.label: Hazardous Substances
properties.comment: Hazardous substances present in the product.

properties.label: Hazard Pictogram Code
properties.comment: CLP/GHS pictogram code (GHS01..GHS09). Set-valued: a substance can carry multiple pictograms.

properties.label: Hazard Signal Word
properties.comment: CLP Regulation 1272/2008 signal word: Danger or Warning.

properties.label: Hazard Statement (H-statement)
properties.comment: CLP H-statement code (e.g. H315, H319). Set-valued: a substance can carry multiple H-statements.

properties.label: Identity Credential URL
properties.comment: URL to a verifiable credential proving identity (Digital Identity Anchor or similar).

properties.label: Impact Indicator
properties.comment: An environmental impact indicator result reported within the EPD.

properties.label: Indicator Total Value
properties.comment: Aggregate value of the indicator across the declared lifecycle modules, in the declared unit.

properties.label: Indicator Type
properties.comment: The EN 15804 impact category this result reports (e.g. oec:GWPTotal).

properties.label: Indicator Unit
properties.comment: Declared unit for this indicator (e.g. kg CO2 eq, kg CFC11 eq, mol H+ eq, m3 world eq deprived).

properties.label: Is Critical Raw Material
properties.comment: Whether this material is on the EU Critical Raw Materials list.

properties.label: Is Regulation Compliant
properties.comment: Asserts that a trade item complies with a specific regulatory act. Used inside a gs1:regulatoryInformation block alongside gs1:regulatoryAct. Replaces the non-existent gs1:isRegulationCompliant referenced in earlier drafts.

properties.label: Is Strategic Raw Material
properties.comment: Boolean flag: material is on the EU Strategic Raw Materials list per CRMA Annex I (2024/1252). Strategic ⊂ Critical: every strategic raw material is also a critical raw material, but not vice versa.

properties.label: IUPAC Name
properties.comment: Systematic IUPAC chemical name of the substance, complementing the CAS/EC registry numbers.

properties.label: Language
properties.comment: Language tag of a value (EN 18223 4.1.2.8.2): ISO 639 language plus EN ISO 3166-1 country, for example "en-GB".

properties.label: Language Code
properties.comment: ISO 639-1 language code. See also gs1:fileLanguageCode.

properties.label: Last Data Update
properties.comment: Timestamp of the last update to the DPP data.

properties.label: Last Updated
properties.comment: Date and time of the latest update to the DPP instance (EN 18223 lastUpdated), UTC, ISO 8601.

properties.label: Lifecycle Stage
properties.comment: The EN 15804 lifecycle module this value applies to (e.g. oec:StageA1).

properties.label: Lifecycle Stage Result
properties.comment: A single EN 15804 module value contributing to this indicator.

properties.label: Mass Fraction
properties.comment: Mass fraction of this material (0-1 scale where 0.45 = 45%).

properties.label: Material Circularity Indicator
properties.comment: Overall circularity score combining recycled input, recyclability, and utility (0-1 scale).

properties.label: Multi-Language Value
properties.comment: A language-tagged value of a MultiLanguageDataElement (EN 18223 4.1.2.8).

properties.label: Operational Scope
properties.comment: Lifecycle boundary for emissions calculation (CradleToGate or CradleToGrave).

properties.label: Operator Information
properties.comment: Economic operator responsible for the product.

properties.label: Operator Role
properties.comment: Role of the economic operator (manufacturer, importer, etc.).

properties.label: Passport Expiry Date
properties.comment: Date when this Digital Product Passport expires or requires renewal.

properties.label: Passport Identifier
properties.comment: Globally unique identifier (URI) for this DPP instance (EN 18223 'digitalProductPassportId'; JSON key digitalProductPassportId).

properties.label: Passport Issue Date
properties.comment: Date when this Digital Product Passport was issued.

properties.label: Passport Issuer
properties.comment: Economic operator responsible for issuing and maintaining this Digital Product Passport.

properties.label: Passport Status
properties.comment: Lifecycle status of this DPP (EN 18223 'dppStatus'): a lowercase string token (see oec:PassportStatus).

properties.label: Passport Version
properties.comment: Version of this Digital Product Passport.

properties.label: Performance Class
properties.comment: Performance or efficiency class (e.g., A+++ to G for energy labels).

properties.label: Performance Information
properties.comment: Product performance and durability information.

properties.label: Post-Consumer Recycled Content
properties.comment: Fraction of post-consumer recycled content (0-1 scale).

properties.label: Power Consumption: Off Mode
properties.comment: Power consumed in off mode. gs1:QuantitativeValue with unitCode 'WTT'.

properties.label: Power Consumption: On Mode
properties.comment: Power consumed in active operating mode. gs1:QuantitativeValue with unitCode 'WTT'.

properties.label: Power Consumption: Standby Mode
properties.comment: Power consumed in standby. gs1:QuantitativeValue with unitCode 'WTT'.

properties.label: Precautionary Statement (P-statement)
properties.comment: CLP P-statement code (e.g. P101, P280). Set-valued.

properties.label: Pre-Consumer Recycled Content
properties.comment: Fraction of pre-consumer (post-industrial) recycled content (0-1 scale).

properties.label: Previous Passport Version
properties.comment: Reference to the previous version of this passport, supporting version history per EN 18221.

properties.label: Primary Sourced Ratio
properties.comment: Proportion of data from direct measurement vs estimates (0-1 scale).

properties.label: Product Category
properties.comment: ESPR product category classification.

properties.label: Professional Repair Network
properties.comment: URL to find authorized repair service providers.

properties.label: Recyclability Assessment
properties.comment: Links a product to its recyclability assessment.

properties.label: Recyclability Methodology
properties.comment: URI of the recyclability methodology used (e.g. PEF, EN 15343, JRC textile preparatory study, PPWR Annex II).

properties.label: Recyclability Rate
properties.comment: Decimal fraction (0-1) of the product that can be recycled. Aligns with untp:recyclableContent.

properties.label: Recyclability Score
properties.comment: Numeric recyclability score (e.g. 0-10 per JRC textile methodology). Use unitCode aligned with the methodology when expressed via gs1:QuantitativeValue.

properties.label: Recyclable Content
properties.comment: Fraction of product that can be recycled (0-1 scale where 0.45 = 45%).

properties.label: Recycled Content
properties.comment: Total fraction of recycled content (0-1 scale where 0.45 = 45%).

properties.label: Recycled Content Details
properties.comment: Detailed recycled content breakdown with pre/post-consumer splits.

properties.label: Registration Number
properties.comment: Official registration or license number.

properties.label: Remanufacturing / refurbishment date
properties.comment: Date on which a product was remanufactured or refurbished and re-released as fit for purpose. Cross-sector: applies to any DPP-covered product that re-enters service after refurbishment (rail rolling stock, batteries, electronics, textiles).

properties.label: Repairability Class
properties.comment: Repairability class (A to E, where A is most repairable).

properties.label: Repairability Information
properties.comment: Repair and maintenance information for the product.

properties.label: Repairability Score
properties.comment: Repairability index score (typically 0-10 scale, e.g., French Indice de Réparabilité).

properties.label: Repair Information Portal URL
properties.comment: URL of the manufacturer's public repair information portal as required by EU Right-to-Repair Directive 2024/1799 Article 4: covers spare-parts catalogue, dismantling guides, software updates available to independent repairers.

properties.label: Repair Instructions
properties.comment: URL or reference to repair instructions and manuals.

properties.label: Repair Provider
properties.comment: Links a product to one or more authorised repair providers.

properties.label: Report Date
properties.comment: Date of the due diligence report.

properties.label: Reporting Granularity
properties.comment: BatteryPass per-attribute reporting granularity (model / model-per-site / batch / item). Distinct from the passport-level EN 18223 'granularity' (oec:granularityLevel).

properties.label: Report URL
properties.comment: URL to the due diligence report.

properties.label: Safe Disassembly Instructions
properties.comment: Instructions for safe disassembly and handling of components containing the substance.

properties.label: Safe Use Instructions
properties.comment: Instructions for safe use of the product containing the substance of concern.

properties.label: SCIP ID
properties.comment: Identifier in the ECHA SCIP database (Substances of Concern In Products).

properties.label: Separate Collection Info
properties.comment: URL to separate collection requirements. For text-based recycling guidance, see gs1:consumerRecyclingInstructions.

properties.label: Software Updates Availability
properties.comment: Duration for which software/firmware updates will be provided. Use unitCode 'ANN' (UN/CEFACT Rec 20).

properties.label: Spare Parts Availability
properties.comment: Duration for which spare parts will be available. Use gs1:QuantitativeValue with unitCode 'ANN' for years.

properties.label: Stage Value
properties.comment: Indicator value for this lifecycle module, in the indicator's declared unit.

properties.label: Substance Location
properties.comment: Location or component where the substance is present in the product.

properties.label: Substances of Concern
properties.comment: List of substances of concern present in the product per ESPR and SCIP database requirements.

properties.label: Supply-Chain Transparency URL
properties.comment: URL of a public supply-chain map / transparency endpoint (CSDDD Article 16, ESPR Article 7).

properties.label: Take-Back Incentive
properties.comment: Free-text description of any consumer incentive (refund, credit, replacement).

properties.label: Take-Back URL
properties.comment: URL of the consumer-facing take-back program landing page.

properties.label: Technical Lifetime
properties.comment: Technical lifetime under specified conditions. Use unitCode 'ANN' (UN/CEFACT Rec 20).

properties.label: Tested Conditions
properties.comment: Description of conditions under which performance was tested.

properties.label: Third Party Assurances URL
properties.comment: URL to third party verification or assurances.

properties.label: Traceability Performance
properties.comment: Traceability performance metrics for supply chain verification.

properties.label: Trade Item Piece Count
properties.comment: Total number of physical pieces that together constitute the complete trade item identified by the parent GTIN.

properties.label: Trade Item Piece Description
properties.comment: Human-readable description of what this specific piece is (e.g., 'Jacket', 'Trousers', 'Left shoe', 'Instruction booklet').

properties.label: Trade Item Piece Number
properties.comment: The sequential number of this piece within the multi-piece trade item (1-based). For a 2-piece suit, the jacket might be piece 1 and trousers piece 2.

properties.label: Trade Item Piece Of
properties.comment: Links an individual piece to the multi-piece trade item (identified by its GTIN) it belongs to.

properties.label: Usage Cycles
properties.comment: Number of expected usage cycles (e.g., charging cycles for batteries).

properties.label: Utility Factor
properties.comment: Durability of the product relative to industry average (1.0 = average). A value >1 indicates above-average durability.

properties.label: Value
properties.comment: The value of a SingleValuedDataElement or MultiLanguageValue (EN 18223 4.1.2.5, 4.1.2.8.2). Any JSON data type.

properties.label: Value Data Type
properties.comment: XSD data type of the value (EN 18223 4.1.2.9), for example "xsd:integer".

properties.label: Verification Body
properties.comment: Organization that performed third-party verification.

properties.label: Verified Ratio
properties.comment: Proportion of materials verifiably traced through the supply chain (0-1 scale).

properties.label: Waste Prevention Info
properties.comment: URL to waste prevention information. For text-based recycling guidance, see gs1:consumerRecyclingInstructions.

enumerations.label: Access Level
enumerations.comment: Access levels for DPP data per ESPR Article 9.

values.label: Authorized Only
values.comment: Data accessible only to market surveillance authorities and customs. Per ESPR Article 9(2).

values.label: Public
values.comment: Data accessible to all users (consumers, market surveillance, customs). Per ESPR Article 9(1).

values.label: Restricted
values.comment: Data accessible only to specific authorized economic operators. Per ESPR Article 9(3).

enumerations.label: Biodegradability Test Method
enumerations.comment: The standardised laboratory method used to assess biodegradability.

enumerations.label: Compostability Type
enumerations.comment: Classification of how a product can be composted.

values.label: Home Compostable
values.comment: Compostable in domestic composting conditions (typically per OK-Compost-Home / NF T 51-800).

values.label: Industrially Compostable
values.comment: Compostable in industrial composting facilities (typically per EN 13432).

enumerations.label: Customs Commodity Code Type
enumerations.comment: The classification system that a customs commodity code belongs to.

enumerations.label: Document Type
enumerations.comment:
Types of supporting documents for DPP.
See also gs1:ReferencedFileTypeCode for GS1 standard document types (PRODUCT_MANUAL, SAFETY_DATA_SHEET, CERTIFICATE, etc.).

values.label: Certificate
values.comment: Official certificate from accredited body (ISO, environmental, quality certifications).

values.label: Declaration of Conformity
values.comment: EU Declaration of Conformity stating compliance with applicable EU legislation.

values.label: Due Diligence Document
values.comment: Documentation of supply chain due diligence processes and risk assessments.

values.label: Environmental Report
values.comment: Environmental impact assessment, carbon footprint study, or LCA report.

values.label: Manual
values.comment: User manual, installation guide, or maintenance documentation.

values.label: Safety Data Sheet
values.comment: Safety Data Sheet (SDS) per REACH Regulation providing hazard information.

values.label: Test Report
values.comment: Technical test results from accredited laboratory or testing facility.

values.label: Third Party Verification
values.comment: Independent verification report from accredited third-party auditor.

enumerations.label: DPP Granularity
enumerations.comment: Reporting granularity of a Digital Product Passport: which level of the product hierarchy a given attribute set describes.

values.label: Battery model per calendar year and per manufacturing site (batch)
values.comment: Attribute reported per batch: model, calendar year, manufacturing site (e.g. carbon footprint, recycled-content shares).

values.label: Individual battery item
values.comment: Attribute reported per individual serial-numbered battery (e.g. serial number, state of health, cycle count).

values.label: Battery model
values.comment: Attribute reported once per battery model (e.g. nominal voltage, expected cycle life).

values.label: Battery model per manufacturing site
values.comment: Attribute reported per (model, manufacturing site) tuple (e.g. manufacturer information, manufacturing place).

enumerations.label: Energy Efficiency Class
enumerations.comment: A-G classification per EU Energy Labelling Regulation 2017/1369 and downstream delegated acts.

enumerations.label: Granularity Level
enumerations.comment: Passport-level granularity per EN 18223 'granularity': model, batch, or item. Values are the lowercase string tokens given by skos:notation. In EPCIS4DPP the level is derived from the GS1 Digital Link Application Identifiers.

values.label: Batch
values.comment: DPP data applies to a specific production batch. GS1 Digital Link 01/{gtin}/10/{lot}.

values.label: Item
values.comment: DPP data applies to an individual serialized item. GS1 Digital Link 01/{gtin}/21/{serial}.

values.label: Model
values.comment: DPP data applies to all products of this model or class. GS1 Digital Link 01/{gtin}.

enumerations.label: Hazard Class
enumerations.comment: Hazard classification categories per EU CLP Regulation.

values.label: Acute Toxicity
values.comment: Substances causing harmful effects after single or short-term exposure via oral, dermal, or inhalation routes.

values.label: Aspiration Hazard
values.comment: Liquid or solid substances causing chemical pneumonia or pulmonary injury if aspirated into airways.

values.label: Carcinogenicity
values.comment: Substances known or suspected to cause cancer in humans.

values.label: Eye Damage or Irritation
values.comment: Substances causing serious eye damage or reversible eye irritation upon contact.

values.label: Germ Cell Mutagenicity
values.comment: Substances that may cause heritable genetic mutations in human germ cells.

values.label: Hazardous to Aquatic Environment
values.comment: Substances posing acute or chronic toxicity risks to aquatic organisms and ecosystems.

values.label: Reproductive Toxicity
values.comment: Substances adversely affecting sexual function, fertility, or development of offspring.

values.label: Respiratory or Skin Sensitization
values.comment: Substances causing hypersensitivity of airways (asthma) or allergic skin reactions after exposure.

values.label: Skin Corrosion or Irritation
values.comment: Substances causing irreversible damage (corrosion) or reversible damage (irritation) to skin tissue.

values.label: Specific Target Organ Toxicity
values.comment: Substances causing non-lethal damage to specific organs after single or repeated exposure.

enumerations.label: Hazard Signal Word
enumerations.comment: CLP Regulation signal word: Danger or Warning.

enumerations.label: Impact Indicator Type
enumerations.comment: Controlled list of EN 15804:2012+A2:2019 environmental impact indicators.

values.label: Abiotic depletion potential, minerals and metals
Global Warming Potential, land use and land-use change
Depletion potential of the stratospheric ozone layer

enumerations.label: Lifecycle Stage
enumerations.comment: Controlled list of EN 15804 lifecycle modules (product, construction, use, end-of-life, and benefits beyond the system boundary).

values.label: D Benefits and loads beyond the system boundary

enumerations.label: Operational Scope
enumerations.comment: Lifecycle boundary for emissions or environmental impact calculations.

values.label: Cradle to Gate
values.comment: Emissions from raw material extraction through manufacturing, excluding use phase and end-of-life.

values.label: Cradle to Grave
values.comment: Full lifecycle emissions including raw materials, manufacturing, use phase, and end-of-life.

enumerations.label: Operator Role
enumerations.comment: Role of an economic operator in the supply chain.

values.label: Authorised Representative
values.comment: Entity authorised by manufacturer to act on their behalf for specific tasks (per ESPR Article 16).

values.label: Distributor
values.comment: Entity in the supply chain that makes a product available on the market, other than manufacturer or importer.

values.label: Fulfilment Service Provider
values.comment: Entity providing fulfilment services including warehousing and order processing (per ESPR Article 17).

values.label: Importer
values.comment: Entity established in the EU that places a product from a third country on the Union market.

values.label: Manufacturer
values.comment: Entity that produces the product, including own-brand labellers per EU Market Surveillance Regulation 2019/1020.

values.label: Processor
values.comment: Entity that processes raw materials or components into finished or intermediate products.

values.label: Trader
values.comment: Entity that buys and sells products without significant modification or processing.

enumerations.label: Passport Status
enumerations.comment: Lifecycle status of a Digital Product Passport (EN 18223 dppStatus). Values are the lowercase string tokens given by skos:notation.

values.label: Active
values.comment: Passport is published and represents the current state of the product.

values.label: Archived
values.comment: Passport is archived after product end-of-life. Data persisted per EN 18221.

values.label: Draft
values.comment: EPCIS4DPP extension: passport is being prepared and not yet publicly available.

values.label: Inactive
values.comment: Passport is not currently in force (EN 18223 base value).

values.label: Invalid
values.comment: Passport is no longer valid (EN 18223 base value, e.g. revoked).

values.label: Suspended
values.comment: EPCIS4DPP extension: temporarily not in force (e.g. pending investigation); a specific kind of inactive.

values.label: Withdrawn
values.comment: EPCIS4DPP extension: passport withdrawn (e.g. product recall); a specific kind of invalid.

enumerations.label: Product Category
enumerations.comment: ESPR priority product categories per Annex I and delegated acts.

values.label: Aluminium
values.comment: Aluminium intermediate products.

values.label: Batteries
values.comment: Batteries and accumulators per EU Battery Regulation 2023/1542.

values.label: Chemicals
values.comment: Chemical substances and mixtures.

values.label: Construction Products
values.comment: Construction products per Construction Products Regulation.

values.label: Electronics
values.comment: Electronic and electrical equipment including ICT and consumer electronics.

values.label: Food Contact Materials
values.comment: Materials and articles intended for food contact.

values.label: Furniture
values.comment: Furniture products including domestic and office furniture.

values.label: Iron and Steel
values.comment: Iron and steel intermediate products.

values.label: Packaging
values.comment: Packaging and packaging waste products.

values.label: Textiles
values.comment: Textile products including apparel, footwear, and home textiles.

values.label: Tyres
values.comment: Tyres for motor vehicles and their trailers.
